---
name: "Charlotte"
surname: "Savage"
image: ../static/people/students/charlotte_pic.jpg

github: charlotteesavage

info:
  - "I am recovering Law graduate/start up product owner/data scientist working with Prof. Kris Thielemans on improving image quantification methods in brain-focused Positron Emission Tomography (PET). "
  - "Outside of academia, I love theatre, running, live music, and art (except pointillism). " 

education:
  - institution: King's College London
    degree: LLB (Hons) Law with European Legal Studies
    enddate: August 2014
  - institution: University of the Witwatersrand
    location: Johannesburg, South Africa
    degree: BSc (Hons) Computational & Applied Mathematics
    enddate: January 2022
  - institution: University College London
    degree: MSc Scientific & Data Intensive Computing
    enddate: January 2026

---

{{< academic-webpage >}}
